scene.message: Maki: You already know{nl} the reason, don't you?{waitkey}{ret}
Reiji: Because we're{nl} not alone...{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: 'Cause us guys{nl} aren't alone.{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: 'Cause Ayase and{nl} the others aren't alone.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Heh... and besides,{nl} we believe in ourselves.{waitkey}{ret}
Pandora: Thank you...{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: It's over...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Yeah...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Hey! Goodbye?{nl} What do you mean...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: I'll send you all{nl} back to the real world...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: {ctl07:1}...{nl} Got a sec?{waitkey}{ret}
{ctl07:1}: ......{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Farewell... everyone...{nl} {wait_fr:88}Farewell... {ctl07:1}.{waitkey}{ret}
